infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BeePlan uses your location for location reminders and to alert you when you are near a friend for a person reminder. Your location is shared only as proximity, never exact coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: BeePlan uses background location to trigger active location reminders when you arrive at or leave a saved place.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: BeePlan uses background location to trigger active location reminders when you arrive at or leave a saved place.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: BeePlan uses your location for location reminders and to alert you when you are near a friend for a person reminder. Your location is shared only as proximity, never exact coordinates.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: BeePlan uses background location to trigger active location reminders when you arrive at or leave a saved place.

plugins.microphonePermission: BeePlan uses your microphone to record voice reminders for the AI assistant.
